elevator_pitch: Open Enterprise AgentOps Mesh is an open-source AgentOps control plane for governing, evaluating, operating, and auditing enterprise AI agents before production.
one_sentence_problem: Enterprises can build AI agent demos quickly, but they struggle to prove that agents are safe, governed, measurable, and ready for real business workflows.
one_sentence_solution: This project provides deterministic governance, evaluation, policy, approval, audit, provider-routing, connector-sandbox, and benchmark layers for enterprise agent programs.

audience_messages.message: Reduce agent project risk before scaling.
audience_messages.proof: Governance workflow, release gates, policy decisions, evidence and audit.

audience_messages.message: Add a vendor-neutral control plane around agents, tools, data, and models.
audience_messages.proof: Reference architecture, provider gateway, connector contracts, tenant boundaries.

audience_messages.message: Turn agent ideas into scored, reviewable, production-readiness candidates.
audience_messages.proof: Evaluation lab, benchmark harness, use-case canvas, demo scenarios.

audience_messages.message: Make agent decisions explainable and auditable.
audience_messages.proof: Policy-as-code, approval workflow, evidence vault, audit event bus.

audience_messages.message: Run the control plane locally and extend deterministic services safely.
audience_messages.proof: FastAPI backend, tests, Docker Compose profile, static consoles.
